channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: My Release Gate Passed. The Model It Shipped Answered 'Neutral' To Everything.
item.description: I trained a model that scored 4 percentage points better than the one I ship. It's gone. I deleted it from the roadmap yesterday. That's not the interesting part. The interesting part is how I...

item.title: 🏗️ MyZubster Architecture Deep Dive
item.description: 🏗️ MyZubster Architecture Deep Dive Complete guide to the system design – from components to data flow and scalability 📌 What is This Guide? This guide explains the complete architecture of the...

item.title: The smolagents bug that made my agent retry the same valid code three times
item.description: Third entry in the DEV x Sentry Bug Smash. Entry 1 was a crash with a confusing message. Entry 2 was a freeze the timeout could not catch. This one is quieter and sneakier: valid Python that the...

item.title: "TypeError: crypto.createCipher is not a function — migrating to createCipheriv on Node.js 22 Lambda"
item.description: If you bumped a Lambda function to nodejs22.x and your handler now dies on the first crypto call, this is the wall: TypeError: crypto.createCipher is not a function The function is simply gone...

item.title: Building a Confidential OTC Settlement Protocol with Oasis Sapphire & Base
item.description: Learn how to build a privacy-preserving OTC trading protocol where counterparties negotiate confidentially using Oasis Sapphire while settling trades transparently on Base. Large cryptocurrency...

item.title: วิธีทดสอบ AI Agent ที่ไม่เป็นเชิงกำหนด (เมื่อ temperature=0 ไม่เพียงพอ)
item.description: การทดสอบของคุณผ่านเมื่อวันจันทร์ ด้วยอินพุตเดิม โค้ดเดิม และ temperature=0 แต่เมื่อวันอังคารมันกลับล้มเหลว ทั้งที่คุณไม่ได้เปลี่ยนอะไรเลย assertion ตรวจสอบสตริงที่ตรงกันเป๊ะ...

item.title: Build a Merchant Crypto Launch Kit for Agencies
item.description: Most developers think about crypto payments as an integration problem. A merchant needs to accept crypto. You connect an API. You test a checkout. You ship it. That works for one client. It does...

item.title: Your NAT gateway is a $30k landmine and nobody warns juniors
item.description: You spend time optimizing a function to be 40 milliseconds faster, but then realize your cloud bill is so high that it's eating up all your savings. I wish someone had told me over a cup of...

item.title: The WordPress post ID is already in every row of your admin list, core just never prints it
item.description: Show post and page IDs in the WordPress admin by enabling Custom Admin Columns in WP Adminify: go to WP Adminify > Productivity, turn on Custom Admin Columns, tick Show Post/Page ID Column, and...

item.title: Cara Menguji Agen AI Non-Deterministik (Saat temperature=0 Tidak Cukup)
item.description: Pengujian Anda lulus pada hari Senin: masukan sama, kode sama, temperature=0. Pada hari Selasa, pengujian gagal tanpa perubahan kode. Assertion membandingkan string persis sama, tetapi model...

item.title: World's Largest AI Model Repository Hugging Face Breached by Autonomous AI Agent
item.description: In an ironic twist, open-source artificial intelligence (AI) platform Hugging Face revealed that it was the victim of a hack perpetrated by an autonomous AI agent system. The company said it...

item.title: SleeperGem Uses Three Malicious RubyGems Packages to Target Developer Machines
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have flagged a new software supply chain attack codenamed SleeperGem targeting the Ruby ecosystem after three malicious gems were published to RubyGems with the end goal...

item.title: What to watch for after Jensen Huang’s Japan visit
item.description: Jensen Huang left Tokyo with deals spanning Japan's entire tech ecosystem.

item.title: This unpronounceable series of glyphs is an incredible side project from Kieran Hebden (aka Four Tet)
Critical NGINX Vulnerability Can Crash Workers and May Allow Remote Code Execution
item.description: F5 has shipped fixes for a critical nginx flaw that lets a remote, unauthenticated attacker trigger a heap buffer overflow in the worker process with crafted HTTP requests. CVE-2026-42533 was...

item.title: Kodak EC35 is a dirt-cheap point-and-shoot film camera
item.description: Following the success of its $99 Kodak-branded Snapic A1, Reto Project is releasing the Kodak EC35, an even more affordable 35mm film camera for just $34.99. The EC35 certainly isn't fancy. Its...

item.title: Can an Apple lawsuit derail OpenAI’s hardware plans?
item.description: On the latest episode of Equity, we debate whether Apple's lawsuit will cast over OpenAi's much-discussed plans to get into hardware and go public.

item.title: I hate that I don’t hate this song made with Suno
item.description: I would never go so far as to say there's no place for AI in music (I'm a fan of Holly Herndon, after all). But I generally find music made with generative AI to be offensively boring, especially...

item.title: The FBI reportedly won’t investigate ICE anymore
item.description: According to the New York Times, federal agents have been told that the FBI will no longer be investigating confrontations involving ICE agents. The DHS and DOJ denied the change in policy to The...

item.title: Orchid is a delightfully retro and approachable hipster synth
item.description: In 2017, I bought an old Magnus chord organ off Craigslist for $10. It's one of my favorite music gear purchases. Electric chord organs let you play full chords with just a press of a button,...

item.title: Birdfy’s solar-powered smart feeder is down to one of its best prices
item.description: Birdfy has kicked off a midyear sale, taking up to 40 percent off a range of its smart bird feeders. One of the best deals is on Netvue’s Birdfy Feeder AI-Powered Smart Bird Feeder with Camera,...

item.title: ‘Odyssey’ director Christopher Nolan calls AI an obvious ‘Trojan horse’
item.description: "Everybody knows the Greeks are inside."

item.title: US Marshals arrest the Tate brothers in Miami
item.description: The manosphere influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate were arrested Saturday in Miami by US Marshals in relation to new rape and sex trafficking charges in England. According to the Associated Press,...

item.title: Nonprofit Current AI is racing to build the World Wide Web of AI, free for all
item.description: Current AI, a non-profit building AI that leaves no one culture behind, has made remarkable progress across devices, AI chat and more.

item.title: UAC-0145 Uses ClickFix CAPTCHAs to Infect Ukrainian Devices wih Malware
item.description: Russian state-sponsored threat actors have been observed leveraging the infamous ClickFix strategy to trick Ukrainian targets into infecting their own machines with data-stealing malware....

item.title: The Clapper was a bad smart home gadget — and a viral sensation
item.description: Clap on. Clap off. Well, more like, Clap, pause for half a beat but no longer because otherwise it'll stop hearing you, clap again because you waited too long, clap louder and faster, that didn't...

item.title: SonicWall SMA Zero-Days Exploited Before Disclosure to Gain Root Access
item.description: A previously undocumented threat actor has been attributed to the exploitation of recently disclosed SonicWall Secure Mobile Access (SMA) 1000 series VPN appliances as zero-days prior their public...

item.title: The future of physical games is not looking great
item.description: This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on video games and physical media, follow Jay Peters. The Stepback arrives in our...

item.title: The grueling, 630-mile road race where the only fuel is sunlight
item.description: On July 19th, dozens of teams of high school students will begin a five-day, 630-mile road race from Fort Worth to Fort Stockton in Texas. But this is not your typical contest. The students design...

item.title: Kimi: Threat or menace?
item.description: Chinese company Moonshot AI released a new version of its Kimi model this week, prompting concern about "full AI communism."
